title: From Bitcoin to blockchain: Key cryptocurrency terms and what they mean

title: Morgan Stanley Wealth Management and Galaxy Digital Announce Referral Capability for In-Kind Creation of Spot Crypto ETP Shares
description: NEW YORK — Morgan Stanley Wealth Management today announced a new referral arrangement with Galaxy Digital (“Galaxy”) through which eligible clients can lend cryptocurrency to Galaxy and receive shares of exchange‑traded products (“ETPs”) with exposure to spot crypto, including, but not limited to, the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT), offered by Morgan Stanley Investment Management.
